headline: Seceon Recognized in the 2026 Gartner® "Voice of the Customer" Report for Security Information and Event Management
summary: Seceon Inc., a leading provider of AI-driven cybersecurity solutions for enterprises and managed security service providers (MSSPs), today announced its inclusion in the "Voice of the Customer" for Security Information and Event Management (SIEM), published April 10, 2026. The recognition is based entirely on verified reviews and ratings submitted by Seceon customers on the Gartner Peer Insights platform over an 18-month period.

headline: Gartner to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 5, 2026
summary: STAMFORD, Conn., April 21, 2026--Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) will report its financial results for first quarter 2026 before the market opens on Tuesday, May 5, 2026.
